title: 2026 Oscar Winners: Best Picture and Top Contenders
text: One Battle After Another from Warner Bros. claimed the top prize at the 98th Academy Awards, a political thriller depicting an authoritarian American police state. The film achieved significant dominance in both total wins and category distribution. One Battle After Another won 6 awards including Best Picture, Director, Adapted Screenplay, Supporting Actor, Casting, and Film Editing. Sinners won 4 awards including Original Screenplay, Lead Actor, Original Score, and Cinematography. Paul Thomas Anderson stated: I wrote this movie for my kids to say sorry for the housekeeping mess that we left in this world we're handing off to them, but also with the encouragement that they will be the generation that hopefully brings us some common sense and decency. Michael B. Jordan stated: God is good while thanking director Ryan Coogler for providing opportunity and space for me to be seen. Both films were distributed by Warner Bros., contributing to the studio's celebrated 2025 performance alongside hits like Superman and A Minecraft Movie. However, this victory arrives amid significant industry turmoil, as Warner Bros. Discovery faces a near-111 billion dollar acquisition deal with Paramount.
